meta.title: Mousa Ahmed - Full Stack Developer
meta.description: Full Stack Developer specializing in React, Next.js, TypeScript, and modern web technologies. Building exceptional digital experiences with passion and precision.
meta.keywords: Full Stack Developer, React, Next.js, TypeScript, Web Development, Frontend Developer, Backend Developer, Mousa Ahmed

hero.title: Do you need a high-performance, scalable web application?
hero.subtitle1: I'm Mousa — a Frontend Engineer focused on building fast, maintainable, and user-friendly web experiences.
hero.subtitle2: I specialize in React ecosystems, performance optimization, and clean architecture. I don't just build interfaces — I focus on how things behave, scale, and feel in real-world usage.

paragraphs.p1: I'm a Frontend Engineer based in Cairo, Egypt, with 3+ years of experience building responsive, intuitive web applications. My primary tool is Next.js, with Angular as a strong secondary, and I take pride in turning complex Figma designs into pixel-perfect, performant interfaces.
paragraphs.p2: I currently build high-performance, scalable apps at Smicolon GmbH, where I work with TypeScript, SSR/SSG, Headless CMS (Strapi), and motion libraries to ship polished products in a Scrum environment. Before that, I spent almost two years at AlexApps building real-time dashboards, e-commerce flows, and multi-language apps with React, MUI, and Socket.io.
paragraphs.p3: On the side, I take on freelance projects — from a Vue-based sales platform with role-based permissions and a loyalty system, to a Next.js dashboard for school pickups in Saudi Arabia with real-time notifications, NextAuth, and i18n.
paragraphs.p4: I'm driven by clean code, efficient problem-solving, and continuous learning. I care about clear communication, good time management, and shipping work I'd be happy to put my name on.

contact.title: Let's Work Together
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? I'd love to hear about it. Drop me a message and let's create something amazing together.
contact.infoBody: I'm currently available for freelance work and full-time opportunities. If you have a project that you want to get started, think you need my help with something, or just fancy saying hey, then get in touch.
contact.ctaCardBody: I'm open to discussing new opportunities, collaborations, and exciting projects.
